# Skeleton

Loading placeholder components that mimic the shape of content while data is being fetched.

## Import

```jsx
import { Skeleton, SkeletonText, SkeletonCircle } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Skeleton` | A rectangular loading placeholder. |
| `SkeletonText` | A text block placeholder with multiple lines. |
| `SkeletonCircle` | A circular loading placeholder (e.g., for avatars). |

## Props

### Skeleton / SkeletonCircle

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loading` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the skeleton is visible. When `false`, renders children. |
| `variant` | `"pulse" \| "shine" \| "none"` | `"pulse"` | The animation variant. |
| `height` | `string \| number` | - | The height of the skeleton. |
| `width` | `string \| number` | - | The width of the skeleton. |

### SkeletonText

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loading` | `boolean` | `true` | Whether the skeleton is visible. When `false`, renders children. |
| `variant` | `"pulse" \| "shine" \| "none"` | `"pulse"` | The animation variant. |
| `noOfLines` | `number` | `3` | The number of text lines to render. |

## Usage

### Basic Skeleton

```jsx
<Skeleton height="20px" />
```

### Skeleton Text

```jsx
<SkeletonText noOfLines={4} />
```

### Skeleton Circle

```jsx
<SkeletonCircle size="12" />
```

### Conditional Loading

```jsx
<Skeleton loading={isLoading}>
  <p>This content is shown when loading is false.</p>
</Skeleton>
```

### Shine Variant

```jsx
<Skeleton variant="shine" height="40px" />
<SkeletonText variant="shine" noOfLines={3} />
```
